prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: You've got this. That task isn't bigger than your ability—it’s just waiting for you to show up. The resistance you feel? It’s normal. But every minute you delay only gives it more power. Take a deep breath, commit to just *starting*, and trust that momentum will carry you forward. You don’t have to finish it perfectly—just begin. And once you do, you’ll wonder why you waited so long. Go! 💪
